passwordGenerator.title: Password Generator
passwordGenerator.subtitle: Create a secure password with cryptographic protection

info.title: Secure Password Generator Online
info.description: Our online password generator uses the cryptographically secure crypto.getRandomValues algorithm to create strong and random passwords. All passwords are generated locally in your browser without being sent to any server, ensuring maximum privacy and security.

recommendationsList.banking: For banks, payment systems, and financial services — use passwords with 16+ characters including letters, numbers, and special symbols
recommendationsList.email: For email and social networks — 12+ characters with letters and numbers
recommendationsList.wifi: For WiFi and routers — 16+ characters without similar symbols (e.g., O/0, l/1)
recommendationsList.games: For games, forums, and websites — 10+ characters

securityTipsList.unique: Use a unique password for each site
securityTipsList.noPersonal: Don't use your name, birth date, or other personal information
securityTipsList.manager: Store passwords in a password manager
securityTipsList.change: Regularly update important passwords every 3–6 months

numberToWords.title: Number to Words Online
numberToWords.subtitle: Number to text converter with tax support and multiple currencies

info.title: Number to Words Converter – Convert Numbers into Words Online
info.description: Looking for a fast and accurate number to words converter? Our online tool helps you instantly convert numbers into words for documents, invoices, contracts, and financial records.
info.currencySupport: Convert Numbers to Words in Multiple Currencies
info.currencySupportDesc: Easily write amounts in words for: US dollars (USD), Euros (EUR), Rubles (RUB), Yuan (CNY), Tenge (KZT), Hryvnia (UAH). This makes the tool perfect for international documents and financial operations.
info.taxSupportDesc: Our amount in words generator also supports automatic tax calculations: VAT rates (5%, 7%, 10%, 12%, 15%, 16%, 17%, 18%, 20%, 22%) and Income tax/PIT (13%, 15%, 18%, 22%). Enter your amount, select the tax rate, and get the final result instantly.

featuresList.instant: Convert any number into words instantly
featuresList.browser: Works directly in your browser (no installation required)

popularExamplesList.decimal: 377.60 → three hundred seventy-seven and sixty cents
popularExamplesList.vat: Amount in words with VAT → automatic calculation
popularExamplesList.contract: Number in words for contracts → ready-to-use formats

info.howToUse: How to Use the Number to Words Converter

howToUseSteps.step3: Get the result in words instantly
howToUseSteps.step4: Copy and use in your document

useCasesList.contracts: For contracts: Generate legally formatted amounts in words for agreements and official documents.
useCasesList.invoices: For invoices: Convert invoice totals into words with VAT included.
useCasesList.payments: For payment documents: Write amounts in words with cents or decimals depending on your needs.

faqList.q1: What is a number to words converter?
faqList.a1: It is a tool that converts numeric values into written text format.
faqList.q2: Why do I need to write numbers in words?
faqList.a2: It is required for legal documents, invoices, and financial records.
faqList.q3: Can I use it for invoices and contracts?
faqList.a3: Yes, the tool is designed specifically for these purposes.
